name: Sloppy Joes (Hess)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Celery with leaves; finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Add salt to meat.
2. Turn meat into a large dry, cold frying pan.
3. Stir over medium heat with a large kitchen fork (not a spoon) until meat changes color all over and any liquid fat pours off.
4. Add onion, celery, and green pepper. Cook 1-2 minutes.
5. Combine remaining ingredients; add to meat and mix well.
6. Bring mixture to a boil, cover, reduce heat to low, and let simmer gently for 15-20 minutes, stirring frequently until cooked and well mixed.
Food Exchanges per serving: 2 MEDIUM-FAT MEAT EXCHANGES + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE. When served on WHOLE HAMBURGER BUN, ADD 2 STARCH EXCHANGES; CAL: 165; CHO: 4g; PRO: 15g; FAT: 9g; SOD: 589; CHO: 47mg; For low-sodium diets, omit salt. Use low-sodium catup and unsalted beef broth.
